name: Obsidian Graph Memory
description: Compile Obsidian markdown vaults into local graph memory artifacts for retrieval, linting, and agent workflows.

vaultPath.label: Vault Path
vaultPath.help: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault to compile and query.

artifactDirName.label: Artifact Directory
artifactDirName.help: Hidden directory inside the vault used for compiled graph memory artifacts.

defaultQueryMode.label: Default Query Mode
defaultQueryMode.help: Use lookup for lexical ranking or graph for lexical ranking plus neighborhood expansion.

sourceSummaryDir.label: Source Summary Directory
sourceSummaryDir.help: Reserved folder for future machine-authored source summary notes.
